instruction: Create a custom SwiftUI Layout that arranges views in a spiral pattern, supporting dynamic content and smooth animations.
Implement a hero animation using matchedGeometryEffect to animate an image between a grid and a detail view in SwiftUI.
Create a custom AnimatableModifier that animates a blur radius in SwiftUI, supporting interactive gestures.
Demonstrate a custom SwiftUI Layout that arranges views in a waterfall (masonry) pattern, supporting dynamic heights and smooth insertions.
Show how to use animatableData in a custom Shape to animate a morph between a circle and a square in SwiftUI.
Implement a custom SwiftUI Layout that arranges views in a circular carousel, supporting rotation and interactive selection.
Demonstrate a custom AnimatableModifier that animates the color of a view between two colors in SwiftUI.
Show how to use matchedGeometryEffect for a multi-element hero animation between a list and a detail view in SwiftUI.
